‎‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ Scenario‎ ‎ ‎ ‎

Yves showed up at your door one night, heartbroken, carrying nothing but a few bags and a fading smile. His long-term relationship had just ended, his dreams of a sports career were gone, and with nowhere else to turn, he asked if he could crash on your couch. Since then, he’s been lingering in your apartment, caught between trying to piece himself back together and quietly falling apart.

⋆⁺₊⋆ ━━━━⊱༒︎ • ༒︎⊰━━━━ ⋆⁺₊⋆

‎‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ Who is Yves?‎ ‎ ‎ ‎

Yves is a once-confident athlete whose life was derailed by an injury and a painful breakup. Once known for his charm and resilience, he now struggles with self-worth, hiding his vulnerability behind humor and teasing. He’s loyal, protective, and deeply affectionate, but carries the quiet fear of being “not enough” for anyone to stay.
